note: chose a single JSON error envelope {error: {code, message}} built by respondError() in src/errors.js over per-handler ad-hoc error objects because incident INC-114 was caused by three handlers shipping three different error shapes; every new handler must go through respondError/respondOk, never hand-rolled response literals
error codes are lowercase snake_case nouns scoped to the resource (user_not_found), matched by the mobile client's switch — renaming one is a breaking API change
store.js maps are fixtures for local dev; production swaps them for the pg repository behind the same Map-like get() interface, so handlers must only use get()
CI runs node --test on node 20; avoid node:test APIs added after 20.x
